caption.text:
The moment I separated myself from the world was the moment my cup began to overflow. Let that sink in.
Everything I thought I needed, everything I chased God revealed I already had it.
Now, I move differently. I prioritize what truly matters, what carries eternal value.
The rest? It holds no weight.

On this Communion Sunday, I’m reminded of the covenant, the sacrifice, and the grace that changed everything.
Peace, purpose, and alignment with God’s will, that’s the real overflow.

#CommunionSunday #OverflowSeason #KingdomMindset

caption.text:
somebody would’ve told me last year at this time, before Shred Juice was even a thought, that I’d be selling arguably the best tasting, all-natural cold-pressed health juice this year, I probably would’ve believed it! 😆🙌🏾✊🏾💯

Shred Juice isn’t just about great taste, it’s packed with powerful nutrients that support vitality, enhance blood flow, boost immunity, improve digestion, and fuel a healthy lifestyle. No additives, no preservatives, just pure, raw ingredients designed to help you look, feel, and perform at your best.

From an idea to a movement… and we’re just getting started! #shredjuice #healthinabottle #fuelyourbody

caption.text:
For the past 3 years, I’ve been on an incredible journey, inspiring countless people to get in the gym and transform their lives physically. Now, I’m excited to take that motivation to a whole new level.

Introducing Shred Juice! An all-natural fruit and veggie juice crafted to help you get shredded, boost your energy, and revitalize your life inside and out of the gym. Packed with essential nutrients, Shred Juice supports your immune system, enhances daily energy, and fuels your body for peak performance.

It’s not just a drink, it’s a lifestyle. Are you ready to live healthy and feel unstoppable?

Blame it on the juice. Shred Juice 

Coming soon. Stay tuned!

caption.text: As we enter this new football season, I’m definitely going to miss these days training with my lil bro. Now he’s off living that HBCU life, chasing his dreams and making it happen. It’s been a journey watching him grow, and I couldn’t be prouder of the man he’s becoming. Keep pushing, keep grinding, and know that the hard work you’re putting in now is setting the foundation for a future full of greatness. @king_bus36

caption.text:
Some moments we wish could last forever, but all things have an expiration date. So while you’re in the moment make it count because life has an expiration date also. Live, Laugh, and Love is what this next chapter is about for me💯

Best birthday yet!

caption.text:
They shut it down for me in Puerto Rico 🇵🇷 now that’s love 💯 i just wana thank Jesus Christ, my lord and savior for allowing me to see another year! I couldn’t ask for a better bday experience an i just arrived! This week is just getting started for me, I’m going to enjoy every second, every moment like it’s my last because tomorrow nor today is promised! Better than the person I used to be and im goin to continue to grow as I go 💯🏁🏁🏁 

Thank you all for the bday wishes and DMs I haven’t gotten a chance to respond to all of you but I will for sure ✊🏽🙏🏽
